## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss IDE sketching for AI workflow development, focusing on Daniel's experience and workflow to inform future tool design.](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current tools (Studio, Temporal, LangFuse) each have strengths but require constant context-switching, hindering workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Ideal IDE would integrate workflow execution, debugging, prompt engineering, and evaluation in a seamless interface](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Evaluation and quality checks should be built into the workflow creation process from the start](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [There's a tension between local development and cloud-based services for AI workflow tools that needs to be balanced](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Topics

### Current Workflow and Pain Points

  - [Daniel uses multiple tools in parallel: Studio, Temporal, LangFuse, and Anthropic Console](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Constant context-switching between tools slows down the development process](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Difficulty in tracing API calls and LLM interactions within the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Limited visibility into cost and performance metrics during development](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

### Ideal IDE Features

  - [Integrated view of workflow execution, including sub-workflows and individual activities](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Easy access to input/output for each step, especially LLM calls and API interactions](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Built-in prompt playground with context awareness of the current workflow](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Ability to reset and re-run specific parts of the workflow without losing context](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Improved visualization of metrics, errors, and evaluation results](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

### Evaluation and Quality Checks

  - [Daniel starts with exemplars and success criteria when designing prompts](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Anthropic Console's approach of generating good/bad examples is valuable](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Need for dynamic, context-aware evaluation that can adapt to specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Potential for self-improving prompts and evaluations over time](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

### Tool Comparison

  - [Maestro: Good documentation and onboarding, but limited functionality in practice](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Anthropic Console: Excellent for prompt engineering, but recent UI changes have removed some useful features](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [LangFuse: Good for prompt tracing, but limited in scope compared to full workflow needs](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### Open Source vs. Proprietary Considerations

  - [Core workflow engine and local development tools could be open source](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Cloud-based services for fine-tuning, dynamic prompt generation, and advanced analytics could be proprietary offerings](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=2159.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to complete and share articles detailing his ideal workflow process](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)
  - [Focus IDE development on expanding run, inspect, and iterate capabilities rather than initial workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)
  - [Explore ways to integrate evaluation and quality checks earlier in the workflow development process](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=2759.0)
  - [Consider how to balance local development experience with cloud-based services for advanced features](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=2902.0)
  - [Investigate potential for open-sourcing core components while maintaining proprietary advanced features](https://fathom.video/share/pwCMzHor_rzNm7WY-nUs9PMRngghQFks?tab=summary&timestamp=4949.0)
